title: Recipe
description: A structured recipe record for dashboard menu planning, ingredient tracking, and preparation reference.

title.description: The display name of the recipe as it should appear in the dashboard.

yield.description: The finished quantity produced by the recipe, such as number of portions, pans, trays, or servings.

category.description: The menu or production category for the recipe, such as soup, entree, side, dessert, or salad.

ingredients.description: The ingredients required to prepare the recipe.

items.description: A single ingredient with quantity and unit details.

name.description: The ingredient name as it should appear in prep lists or recipe views.

amount.description: The numeric quantity of the ingredient needed for the recipe.

unit.description: The measurement unit for the ingredient amount, such as lb, oz, cup, tsp, each, or case.

steps.description: The ordered preparation instructions for completing the recipe.

items.description: A single preparation instruction in the recipe method.

notes.description: Operational notes, source context, or special handling details for kitchen production.
